playbook.intent: New screen with no review -> severity-rated heuristic issues + ready for engineering follow-up.
playbook.scope: Designer runs a 1-hour heuristic evaluation on one screen. Walks each of Nielsen's 10 heuristics + project a11y rules, captures issues with severity, and queues follow-ups. Done when the issue list has severities and the top-severity items are queued.

success-criteria.criterion: Top-severity items queued with engineering or design
Issue list filed in the repo

stage.name: Set context
stage.intent: Know the screen's purpose before grading.

tasks.task: Note user role + task on this screen
Identify project-specific a11y rules to check

stage.name: Walk core heuristics

tasks.task: Check match between system and real world

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after all 4 are walked.

stage.name: Walk error + memory heuristics
stage.decision-gate: Advance only after all 4 are walked.

stage.name: Walk aesthetic + help
stage.decision-gate: Advance only after both heuristics are walked.

stage.name: Score severity
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when severities are assigned.

stage.name: Queue + file
stage.intent: Push top severities into the build queue.

tasks.task: Tag pattern issues for design-system follow-up
File issue list in the repo

stage.decision-gate: Done when top-severity items have tickets.

extra.value: [Skipping context -> heuristic violations without purpose, All-issues-equal severity -> nothing is shipped, No ticket -> findings rot in a doc]
['Did every heuristic get a pass/fail with evidence?', 'Are the top severities ticketed?', 'Did design-system patterns get flagged?']

{human: faion get-content heuristic-evaluation-on-a-new-screen-1hr --format md, agent: faion get-content heuristic-evaluation-on-a-new-screen-1hr --format context, json: faion get-content heuristic-evaluation-on-a-new-screen-1hr --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
